/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/_core.dir/link.d -shared  -o _core.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_core.dir/src/NASAP_fit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_core.dir/src/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_core.dir/src/bindings/module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_core.dir/src/reactionNetwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_core.dir/src/readcsv.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib:/usr/local/lib -lcasadi /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libklu.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so /usr/local/lib/libsundials_cvodes.so.7.5.0 /usr/local/lib/libsundials_sunlinsolklu.so.5.5.0 /usr/local/lib/libsundials_sunmatrixsparse.so.5.5.0 /usr/local/lib/libsundials_core.so.7.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libklu.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcolamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbtf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsuitesparseconfig.so
